selections.name: Encryptix
selections.reason: Showed excellent early speed on debut here over this exact trip. Should cross and prove tough to catch.

selections.name: Orange Tsunami
selections.reason: Draws perfectly in barrier 2 to capitalize on the massive inside bias at Gosford. Placed nicely on debut.

selections.name: Hellflight
selections.reason: Well-bred filly getting a significant weight advantage (121lbs) and a prime inside draw for her debut.

selections.name: Arato
selections.reason: Has shown flashes of ability including a runner-up finish at Hawkesbury. Needs to overcome a slightly tricky gate.

danger_horse.name: Hellflight
danger_horse.reason: First starter from a strong stable carrying minimum weight from an ideal barrier. Could blow them away.

selections.name: Kharif
selections.reason: Maher-trained galloper drawing the pole position. Ready to peak and gets the ultimate run of the race.

selections.name: Flying Party
selections.reason: Another strong Maher runner coming off a narrow miss at Kembla Grange. Major threat.

selections.name: Jonson
selections.reason: Incredibly consistent type who maps perfectly from barrier 2. Will be in the finish.

selections.name: Ruskana
selections.reason: Waterhouse/Bott runner who will likely press forward. Inside draw gives him a great chance to dictate.

danger_horse.name: Ruskana
danger_horse.reason: If he gets an uncontested lead from the good draw, he could prove very hard to run down on this tight track.

selections.name: Rainbow Charlie
selections.reason: Excellent debut effort and now gets the coveted barrier 1. Will skim the rail and be hard to beat.

selections.name: Pazyryk
selections.reason: Godolphin runner with Rachel King aboard. Draws well and brings strong Metropolitan trial form.

selections.name: Iambubb
selections.reason: Fitter for his return and gets a massive upgrade drawing barrier 2 on this tight circuit.

selections.name: Nuns Chorus
selections.reason: Lightly raced and draws to get a soft run just behind the speed.

danger_horse.name: Pazyryk
danger_horse.reason: Elite stable and jockey combination. Has the tactical speed to utilize the inside draw effectively.

selections.name: Last Tour
selections.reason: Ticks plenty of boxes fourth-up and gets the ultimate advantage of barrier 1 at Gosford.

selections.name: Firey Truth
selections.reason: Resuming for Kris Lees with two solid trials. Draws well enough to be prominent early.

selections.name: Tannin
selections.reason: Godolphin first-starter who won a recent trial. Must be respected despite the slightly tricky gate.

selections.name: Pharland
selections.reason: First starter for Ryan/Alexiou. Trialled well and stays in the mix.

danger_horse.name: Tannin
danger_horse.reason: Well-bred colt from an elite stable. If he handles the tight turns, he has the class to win.

selections.name: Squeezebox
selections.reason: Won well last start and is proven at the trip. Has the tactical speed to overcome the middle draw.

selections.name: Ivy Legend
selections.reason: Drops in grade and strips fitter. Will need luck from the wide gate but has the class edge.

selections.name: Inception
selections.reason: Gets the dream run from the inside barrier. Ready to peak third-up.

selections.name: I Am Wild
selections.reason: Assess on the good win over this track and trip three starts back. Can bounce back.

danger_horse.name: Ivy Legend
danger_horse.reason: Class drop is significant. If the pace is hot, she can swoop late despite the track bias.

selections.name: Luskintyre
selections.reason: Fitter for her return and brings strong form lines. Can press forward and dictate.

selections.name: Serinda
selections.reason: Gets a massive upgrade drawing barrier 2. Will sit just behind the speed and pounce.

selections.name: Don't What Me
selections.reason: Won well last start but faces a tougher map today. Still a major player on form.

selections.name: Red Chick
selections.reason: Talented but heavily penalized by the extreme outside barrier on this tight circuit.

danger_horse.name: Serinda
danger_horse.reason: The barrier draw gives her a huge tactical advantage over the other main market fancies.

selections.name: King Larry
selections.reason: Drops in grade and gets the ultimate map advantage from barrier 1. Should control the race.

selections.name: Prince Harrison
selections.reason: Racing in great form and draws perfectly to stalk the speed. Major threat.

selections.name: Kirkuk
selections.reason: First-up but trialled well and gets a soft run from the inside gate.

selections.name: Starinion
selections.reason: Won well last start and maps to get a beautiful run just behind the leaders.

danger_horse.name: Prince Harrison
danger_horse.reason: Has the tactical speed to utilize the inside draw and is rock-hard fit.
